name: MC the Barber

address.full: 803 E Main St. Suite E. Allen, TX 75002
address.short: 803 E Main St. Suite E. Allen, TX 75002

tagline: Expert haircuts, clean fades, beard trims, at the best barbershop in Allen, Texas.

gallery.alt: Warm interior view of the bar counter with vintage lighting
Handcrafted cocktail with orange peel garnish
The Quiet Bar storefront at night with warm glow
Cozy seating corner with exposed brick walls
Row of brass draft beer taps
Vintage record player and vinyl collection

press.quote: Thank you so much for the excellent haircut! I truly appreciate the attention to detail and the great conversation. You have a real talent for your craft and I'll definitely be returning for my next haircut. Keep up the fantastic work!
I have been going to see Miguel for several years now at Señor brims and don’t see myself working with anyone else to cut my hair. Great barbers, great atmosphere, and a really great haircut.
We love the barber shop! All the barbers are great. My super picky 14 year old son only trusts Miguel with his hair!

He did an outstanding job on my beard trim. He took his time, paid attention to detail, and made sure everything was lined up perfectly. Super friendly, professional, and you can tell he takes pride in his work. I walked out looking sharp and feeling great. Top-quality service!

notices: Walk-ins are always welcome, subject to barber availability. Appointments are recommended to guarantee your preferred time.

seo.metaTitle: MC the Barber at the best barbershop in Allen, TX.
seo.metaDescription: Allen, TX's go-to barbershop for fades, haircuts, head shaves, and beard trims.
